title: Validate crash logging, bridge auto-recovery, and stale-auth recovery with injected failures
summary: Added failure-injection validation coverage for bridge self-healing runtime-state evidence and stale bridge-auth recovery after re-adoption. Targeted tests passed, full cargo test only hit known timing-sensitive prism-mcp flakes, and both isolated reruns passed under repo policy.

acceptance.label: Injected daemon death leaves durable forensic evidence and the bridge converges back to a healthy daemon connection.
Injected stale-auth scenarios produce correct bridge state and successful recovery or accurate user-facing remediation.
